name: enoki
description: Self-hosted Host monitoring with a Hono Hub, Vue Web UI, and Rust Probe.

scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && pnpm run test && pnpm run e2e && pnpm run proto:check && pnpm run rust:check
scripts.rust:check: cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace
scripts.test: vitest run scripts/*.test.mjs && turbo run test
